subcodes.first_line: The Wronged One beareth witness unto that which the Books of God have testified, both aforetime and thereafter. Blessed be they that comprehend [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد المظلوم بما شهدت کتب الله من قبل و من بعد طوبی لقوم یعرفون یا
subcodes.subjects: @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @proclamation to the people of the world, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Manifestation of God as sun
